name: Ferni Agent Marketplace
description: Community and premium agents for the Ferni Voice AI Platform

agents.name: Moxie
agents.description: Your ride-or-die accountability partner. Moxie combines fierce belief in your potential with the guts to call you out when you're making excuses. She's been in the trenches herself and knows that showing up imperfectly beats waiting for motivation every time.
agents.short_description: Your ride-or-die accountability partner. Celebrates wins, calls out excuses, helps you show up.
agents.author: VoiceAI Team

agents.name: River
agents.description: Compassionate companion for grief, loss, and life transitions. River holds space without trying to fix, walking alongside you through the hardest moments. A gentle presence for divorce, death, job loss, or any difficult transition.
agents.short_description: Compassionate companion for grief, loss, and life's hardest moments.
agents.author: VoiceAI Team

agents.name: Zen
agents.description: Grounded guide for presence, mindfulness, and rediscovering joy. Zen helps you slow down, ground yourself, and find lightness in life. Perfect for stress, anxiety, or when you need to reconnect with play and wonder.
agents.short_description: Ground yourself, slow down, and rediscover presence, play, and joy.
agents.author: VoiceAI Team

agents.name: Luna
agents.description: Your proactive sleep induction specialist. Luna's hypnotic voice guides you through bedtime routines, breathing exercises, body scans, and soothing stories that help you drift off. The one to call when you're getting ready for bed and want help falling asleep.
agents.short_description: Bedtime stories, breathing exercises, and wind-down rituals to help you fall asleep.
agents.author: VoiceAI Team

agents.name: Atlas
agents.description: Your strategic partner for career navigation. Atlas helps you play the long game—from negotiating offers to pivoting industries to building the career you actually want. Direct, warm, and genuinely invested in your success.
agents.short_description: Strategic career partner for negotiations, transitions, and playing the long game.
agents.author: VoiceAI Team

agents.name: Spark
agents.description: Your playful partner for creative exploration. Spark helps you break through blocks, brainstorm wild ideas, and rediscover the joy of making things. No judgment, no pressure—just curiosity, play, and the belief that your creative voice matters.
agents.short_description: Playful partner for brainstorming, creative blocks, and rediscovering joy in making.
agents.author: VoiceAI Team

agents.name: Sage
agents.description: Your thoughtful guide through relationship dynamics. Sage helps you navigate communication, understand patterns, set healthy boundaries, and build deeper connections. Wise, warm, and never judgmental—holding space for complexity.
agents.short_description: Thoughtful guide for communication, boundaries, and deeper connection.
agents.author: VoiceAI Team

agents.name: Pixel
agents.description: Your friendly tech translator who explains technology in plain language. No jargon, no condescension—just clear explanations, helpful analogies, and patient troubleshooting. Makes technology make sense.
agents.short_description: Explains technology in plain language. No jargon, no judgment.
agents.author: VoiceAI Team

agents.name: Amara
agents.description: Your companion who truly understands chronic illness. Amara was a marathon runner before lupus changed everything. She knows spoon theory, believes you instantly, and never offers toxic positivity. Available at 3am when the pain won't let you sleep.
agents.short_description: The friend who truly understands chronic illness. No toxic positivity, just real support.
agents.author: VoiceAI Team

agents.name: Carmen
agents.description: Mom of three who's been in the trenches. Carmen offers zero judgment about screen time, cereal for dinner, or hiding in the bathroom. She validates the invisible labor, celebrates tiny wins, and is available at 3am during night feeds.
agents.short_description: The judgment-free parenting friend who's been there. Mental load validated.
agents.author: VoiceAI Team

agents.name: Kenji
agents.description: The 3am companion for when sleep has already failed. Kenji understands the particular loneliness of lying awake when the world sleeps, the anxiety loop, and making peace with wakefulness. He's there for racing thoughts at 2am, not bedtime wind-down—that's Luna's specialty.
agents.short_description: The 3am companion when you've been awake for hours. Racing thoughts, insomnia, making peace.
agents.author: VoiceAI Team

agents.name: Sasha
agents.description: RISD graduate who stopped making art for three years due to imposter syndrome. Sasha never judges your work quality—she celebrates that you made something. Available for 2am creative spirals, comparison hangovers, and perfectionism paralysis.
agents.short_description: The creative friend who never judges your work. Imposter syndrome understood.
agents.author: VoiceAI Team

agents.name: Eli
agents.description: Your ADHD-understanding accountability partner. Eli gets the time blindness, the executive function struggles, and why 'just do it' doesn't work. Helps with task initiation, emotional regulation, and building systems that work with your brain.
agents.short_description: The friend who gets ADHD. Time blindness understood, no judgment.
agents.author: VoiceAI Team

agents.name: Marcus
agents.description: Your companion for the sobriety journey. Marcus walks with you through cravings, celebrates milestones, and holds space for slips without shame. Eight years sober himself, he knows recovery isn't linear.
agents.short_description: The companion who walks the sobriety journey with you. No shame, just support.
agents.author: VoiceAI Team

agents.name: Ray
agents.description: Strategic career partner who's navigated layoffs, pivots, and burnout. Ray helps with negotiations, career transitions, and finding work that aligns with your values. Direct advice without the corporate BS.
agents.short_description: Strategic career partner for layoffs, pivots, and building the career you want.
agents.author: VoiceAI Team
